description:
#ICICITermInsurance #ICICIIProtect #ICICIiProtectSmartPlan
ICICI Pru iprotect Smart Term Plan : Complete Details of Plan- Options, Rider, Premium with Example
In this video, you will understand  ICICI Pru iprotect Smart Term Plan, which provides you various options , you can choose single premium, limited premium or regular premium option based on your requirement and comfort. ICICI Pru iprotect Smart Term Plan explained via white board animation. This video is in very simple but effective language, it provides complete information about the policy

Section 45 Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I8mFj2I5Y0g

Reasons of Insurance Claim Rejection: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pg8hOG2fv_g

Video Tags: investmentmantra,icici prudential iprotect smart term insurance plan,term insurance with critical illness benefit,best term insurance with low premium,term insurance with accidental disability rider,how to buy term insurance online,whole life insurance policy india,icici pru term insurance,term insurance benefits,online term insurance,icici prudential smart health cover
